task_completion.description: Three separate chart windows are open in NinjaTrader 8.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for three distinct chart window frames visible within the NinjaTrader 8 application workspace.

task_completion.description: The chart windows display the symbols SPY, AAPL, and MSFT.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the top-left corner, header, or tab of each chart window for the ticker symbols 'SPY', 'AAPL', and 'MSFT'.

task_completion.description: The timeframe for the charts is set to 60-minute bars.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for '60 Min' or '60' next to the instrument name in the chart header, tab, or timeframe dropdown menu.

task_completion.description: The charts are synchronized using 'Green' interval linking.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a small colored square or linking indicator (typically in the top right or top left of the chart window) that is set to the color Green across the charts.

Look for the crosshair icon in the chart toolbar being set to 'Global' (often indicated by a specific icon state or dropdown selection), or crosshair lines appearing simultaneously on multiple charts.
Look for a 'Save Workspace' dialog being confirmed, or a custom workspace name (other than 'Untitled') displayed in the bottom right corner of the Control Center.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the NinjaTrader 8 GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for mouse clicks, dropdown menus, and window manipulations within the NinjaTrader 8 interface, rather than terminal commands editing configuration files.

integrity.description: The application shown is genuinely NinjaTrader 8.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the screenshots show the actual NinjaTrader 8 application with its standard Control Center and chart windows, not a mock-up, image viewer, or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply paste the task description into a text file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the agent did not open a text editor or terminal to just type or paste the expected answers.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Instruments: SPY, AAPL, MSFT. Expected crosshair: Global (explicitly confirms Global Crosshair is a valid crosshair type that links crosshairs across multiple chart windows). Expected period value: 60. Expected period type: Minute (value 4, representing the interval quantity for minute-based bars). Note: The 'Green' interval linking color is used to group linked windows.
